title: Support - Help Guide
scenario: Verify that tapping Help Guide in Support section redirects to Poly Lens Mobile online help page, and tapping Cancel (X) returns to Support first screen.
steps: 2. Tap on 'Help Guide' in the Support section.
3. Observe that the user is redirected to the Poly Lens Mobile online help page.
4. Tap the Cancel (X) button on the help page.
5. Observe that the screen is dismissed and the user is returned to the Support first screen.
expected: Tapping on Help Guide redirects the user to the Poly Lens Mobile online help page. Tapping the Cancel (X) button dismisses the screen and returns the user to the Support first screen.
